narrative.narrative: Fear has tightened its grip as the Fear & Greed Index plunges to 27, yet beneath the surface, stablecoin reserves are quietly expanding—a classic divergence that marked the August 2024 bottom. With MVRV Z-Score flashing deep value, the market is compressing into a historically explosive setup where sidelined capital waits to reprice risk.
narrative.headline: Silent Accumulation Beneath the Panic

consensus.key_reasoning: The live Fear & Greed score of 27 anchors the phase in Panic (24-31), where divergent signals—expanding stablecoin reserves and deep-value MVRV against weak ETF flows and fading momentum—create an accumulation setup that is not yet confirmed. The 79.3% pattern match to the August 2024 bottom is compelling, but active risk-off divergences warrant patience over premature aggression.
disagreements_noted: Analyst labels the phase Anxiety (39-46) while the Fear & Greed score of 27 sits in the Panic band (24-31), a 2-rung violation corrected to Panic.
Narrative leans bullish accumulation while analyst's diverging factors (ETF flows, VIX, funding) keep the immediate signal cautious.
